# MedInsight

> MedInsight is an Offline-First PWA for managing clinical medical cases in Algerian hospitals. It allows doctors, hospitals, and researchers to document, analyze, and share clinical cases securely.

## Key Features
- Clinical case management (symptoms, diagnoses, treatments)
- Offline/online synchronization
- End-to-end encryption and RBAC access control
- Interactive dashboards and statistics
- Multi-user collaboration with role-based access
- Medical research with anonymized data

## Target Users
- Hospitals and clinics in Algeria
- Doctors and medical practitioners
- Medical researchers
- Pharmacies

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: React 19, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui
- Backend: FastAPI, SQLAlchemy 2, Alembic, PostgreSQL
- Deployment: Vercel (frontend + serverless backend)

## Contact
- Email: contact@medinsight.dz
- Location: Alger, Algérie
